meaning: n.囚犯头(管理其他犯人的犯人)
examples: Birmingham city will be wrapping up a deal for Juventus midfielder olivier kapo today.
Birmingham boss Steve Bruce is trying to sign midfield er olivier kapo from Juventus on a season-long loan.
At the moment I am only thinking of my holidays and it will be Juventus that decides my future, "Kapo told the Spanish press."
Blackburn goalkeeper Brad Friedel had to be alert to palm over Olivier Kapo's close-range header in injury time.
Olivier Kapo's driven cross was met by fellow substitute Mikael Forssell and his effort thundered against the top of the bar before Robinson expertly denied Kapo.
